text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Satsuki Sho, a Classic race that
can be run only once in a lifetime...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm so overwhelmed... I can't believe I'm actually
running in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
These racers are the cream of the crop who
dedicated all they have to compete here...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I guess that means it's the perfect place for
me to unleash my mad skills! ♪
choice_data_list: Show them what you can do!
Show them what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All righty! I'll put the pedal to the metal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's ready to give the other runners another goal
to chase as the gates of the Satsuki Sho fly open!
